chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2604 of 2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Disposed of matter For hearing of M. A. No.46/2025 ------------------------------ 13.02.2025 Mr. Mujahid Hussain, advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Neel Parkah, A.P.G. ------------------------------------------------- This is application for return of surety. It appears that protective bail was granted to applicants/accused Niaz Ahmed, Raees Ahmed, Muzamil, Raja Sohail Ahmed by this Court vide order dated 08.11.2024, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court, with further direction to surrender before the trial Court within seven days. As per Nazir’s report, Ghulam Mustafa son of Muhammad Arif Allah Dino Memon furnished surety by way of depositing cash amount Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Hundred Thousand), Rs.20,000/- for each accused. It is submitted that applicants/accused surrendered before the trial Court, in the aforesaid period. Copy of order dated 21.11.2024 is placed on record. Learned A.P.G. has recorded no objection. In the view of above, surety is no more required. Listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
